metadata.description: 13 Claude Code plugins by Gowtham — session memory, video understanding, disciplined engineering, cost tracking, rollback, scope control, regression testing, and more.

plugins.name: carry-forward
plugins.description: Persists Claude Code session context across sessions. Auto-saves after every response via Stop hook. Auto-loads at session start via CLAUDE.md @import.

plugins.name: video-insight
plugins.description: Give Claude deep understanding of any video. Extracts keyframes, OCR text, colors, motion events, cursor path, fonts, loading states, and confidence scores. 17 skills for frontend code, design specs, tests, PRDs, and more.

plugins.name: deep-engineer
plugins.description: Forces Claude through a disciplined engineering loop: generalize the problem, think through scenarios, TDD, implement, verify. Prevents hardcoded solutions and skipped edge cases.

plugins.name: cost-guard
plugins.description: Token budget and cost tracker. Estimates spending per session, warns at thresholds, and can hard-block tool calls when budget is exceeded.

plugins.name: rubber-duck
plugins.description: Explain-before-code enforcement. Forces Claude to describe its approach in plain English and get approval before writing any code.

plugins.name: rollback
plugins.description: One-command undo for any Claude action. Snapshots files before/after every Write/Edit with instant rollback to any point.

plugins.name: regression-sentinel
plugins.description: Continuous regression watcher. Runs tests automatically after every file edit, detects regressions instantly, and can auto-revert breaking changes.

plugins.name: time-capsule
plugins.description: Git checkpoint auto-saver. Creates lightweight git stash snapshots before risky edits and on demand. Browse and restore any checkpoint.

plugins.name: scope-lock
plugins.description: Prevent scope creep. Define exact files/directories Claude can touch. PreToolUse hooks block Read/Write/Edit outside the boundary.

plugins.name: diff-narrator
plugins.description: After every edit, generates a plain-English summary of what changed. Maintains a running changelog and produces PR-ready descriptions.

plugins.name: dependency-doctor
plugins.description: Analyzes dependencies before installation: vulnerabilities, license compatibility, and package info. Blocks unapproved installs.

plugins.name: pair-mode
plugins.description: Enforces ping-pong pair programming. Claude writes a block, pauses for human review, then continues. Tracks approval rate.

plugins.name: codebase-onboard
plugins.description: Analyzes your codebase and generates an onboarding guide: architecture overview, key patterns, directory structure, tech stack, and getting started.
